universidad nebrija laboratory professor for the subject design of reliable automatic systems of the degree in computer science. fpga verification project responsible at airbus crisa - on behalf of capgemini technical project responsible, working directly with client to carry out the verification of the fpga of a space project using the airbus methodology and the space safety standard. making the project verification plan and the task assignment for the team and forming junior engineers. performing chip-level testing of the fpga system. creation of a verification plan and report for pdr and cdr. technical research 12a2 group of upm iter project for interlock control system. verification and validation of the fast interlock control system using description languages and hardware verification (sv). use of advanced data acquisition instrumentation hardware (compactrio and labview for fpgas). acquisition of skills within a competitive professional environment in an international project. management of advanced instrumentation systems for data acquisition in nuclear fusion environment. internship - indra sistemas: defence and transport department verification and simulation of the vhdl codes of the d-vor system, for their subsequent documentation, as well as search and solution of errors in them. performance of integration and stability tests on the d-vor system in the laboratory. universidad politécnica de madrid (upm): beng in electronic communications engineering during my degree studies, acquired the ability to adapt to different technological and working environments, enhancing my teamwork, as well as my organizational capacity to carry out projects. my final project was development of applications based on fpga soc (cyclone v) with a grade of 10. english: certificate in advanced english c1 (cambridge). consider myself a person who loves technology, as well as being proactive, innovative, creative and with a predisposition to learn. have great interest in the world of systems engineering and aerospace sector, am searching for a dynamic and demanding environment where can apply my engineering knowledge and my soft skills, as well as continue learning from it. believe in teamwork, and consider myself to have leadership skills.
